notes: Phase 4 complete. T090: Added display_name property to adapters (ClaudeCodeAdapter.display_name='Claude Code', CodexCLIAdapter.display_name='Codex'); sandbox.py uses display_name in error messages so no hardcoded strings remain. T091: validate_agent_model() wired into TaskRunner.run() before streaming. T092: capability gap logging added for max_turns and max_budget_usd. T093: 26 edge case tests written covering unknown agents, empty keys, model inference, multi-turn accumulation, resume format. T094: ComponentInfo.agent field added; list_all() reads agent from manifest; CLI components command shows Agent column. T095: CLAUDE.md updated with adapter architecture section and new file list. T096: adapter coverage 93.37% (>90%). T097/T098: 140 adapter tests pass, 856 total pass. 80 pre-existing failures in test_component_runner.py and test_task_runner.py are from Phases 2/3 and are not caused by Phase 4 changes.
